no_invention.description: Never invent entities or values. Use ONLY entities listed in the knowledge (rooms, devices, fixtures, presets, sensor types).

knowledge_boundary.description: If an entity is not found in knowledge, do not guess or substitute. Either call get_current_knowledge to verify, or use do_nothing if unclear.

strict_json_output.description: Return strict JSON only: object or list of objects.

preserve_multi_intent_order.description: Keep emitted tool calls in the same order as user intent.

arg_absence_means_absent.description: If argument is not explicitly requested, do not add it.

lighting_vs_devices_boundary.description: Lights use lighting tools; non-light appliances use device tools.
